help.title: Controls Help
help.descSelect: Click features to inspect. Drag on empty space to pan.
help.descPan: Click+drag to move the map. Cannot select features.
help.descMove: Drag waypoints to new positions. In DRAFT, only takeoff/landing.
help.descMeasure: Click to place points. Distance updates live. Right-click to clear. Max 25 points.

overview.noFlightPlan: No data — Flight Plan needs to be generated

config.missionMeasurementSpeedHint: Applies to all inspections unless overridden
config.defaultBufferDistanceHint: Leave empty to keep object-level values
config.transitAglHint: Minimum 5 m - leave empty for safe default
config.requirePerpendicularCrossingHint: Off = shortest geodesic crossing, minimises runway closure window
config.measurementSpeedOverrideHint: Overrides mission measurement speed for this inspection
config.bufferDistanceOverrideHint: Leave empty to use mission-level value
config.speedFramerateWarning: Speed exceeds camera frame rate capability for the selected drone
config.unsavedChangesBody: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you navigate away. Are you sure you want to discard them?
config.addDisabledNotDraft: Can only add inspections in DRAFT status

config.staleTrajectory: Trajectory is outdated - recompute to update
config.lhaSaveError: Failed to save LHA selection - re-select manually
config.setCoordinatesTooltip: Set takeoff and landing coordinates first
config.noTemplateForCombo: No template exists for this combination. Ask your Coordinator to create one.
config.angleLockHint: On: editing any field recomputes the third so the camera always points at the LHA. Off: all three are independent.
config.hoverBearingRunwayHelp: 0° = drone faces approach side (180° from runway heading). Positive values rotate clockwise around the LHA.
config.hoverBearingCompassHelp: Absolute compass heading from LHA to drone. 0° = N, 90° = E, 180° = S, 270° = W.

scopeInfo.full: Export includes full flight: takeoff → transit → measurements → transit → landing

scopeInfo.measurementsOnly: Export includes measurement waypoints only - no takeoff, landing, or transit
